name: Kingdra Delta Depths
description: A Water-focused Dragon Frontiers deck featuring Kingdra ex δ's Extra Smoke body for team protection and Dragon Pump for high damage output. Pairs with Feraligatr δ for Battle Aura synergy.

cards.name: Horsea δ
cards.role: Basic for Kingdra line, Aqua Pump scaling

cards.name: Seadra δ
cards.role: Stage 1 with Aqua Pump and Waterfall

cards.name: Kingdra ex δ
cards.role: Main attacker with Extra Smoke body

cards.name: Feraligatr δ
cards.role: Battle Aura body for damage boost

notes: Tests damage reduction bodies (Extra Smoke), attack damage that scales with energy (Aqua Pump), and global damage boost bodies (Battle Aura).
